title: IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Mandi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation shall be granted to the SC/ST/OBC Candidates as per GoI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M. S degree in Mechanical/Structural/Aerospace Engineering
qualification.details: M.Tech./M. S degree in Mechanical/Structural/Aerospace Engineering

salary_details.details: Rs 37000 p.m. plus HRA as applicable

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications via email is 31st May 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech./M. S degree in Mechanical/Structural/Aerospace Engineering to be eligible for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIT Mandi JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application, including bio-data and self-attested documents, to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITM/SRIC/Project No DRDO-AR&DB/MT/556/2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 175075.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be granted to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India norms.
